creator: hscholz@raisdorf.net
text:
Hi!
 
 I checked the behaviour on two different machines. A closer look at the
 update.sh shows:
 
 -----  line 13: -----
 # Rotate the log files
 
 umask 22
 
 -----  line 48: -----
 umask 2
 ok=yes
 
 echo "Updating from ${host}"
 su -f -m ${cuser} -c \
     "${cmd} ${options} -h ${host} ${base}/supfile" || ok=no
 
 ---->8----->8----
 
 The umask was initially set correct but then was set to 0002.
 The cvsup user is not in the cvsupin group (${cuser} in line 52 is read
 from config.sh and is cvsupin by default).
 
 For me it seems to be a bug.
 
 Hendrik
 
 -- 
 Hendrik Scholz <hendrik@scholz.net>
 http://www.toppoint.de/~hscholz/
 Where do you want to be tomorrow ?
